reason: Verify multi-target config/runtime preserves backend contracts and does not introduce middleware behavior.
Verify ownership boundaries across config, proxy, app runtime, storage/API state, and protocol adapters.
Verify frontend follow-up expectations are architecture-only and do not implement UI in this backend task.
Check target identity and database_type survive config -> runtime -> event -> API flow.
Avoid duplicating listener/backend target conversion and validation logic across app/proxy/config.
